• Je hebt een Bachelor/Master diploma en enkele jaren relevante ervaring in Data Science

• Je hebt sterke kennis van Machine Learning, NLP, LLM’s en Python

• Je bent een vlotte communicator en positief ingesteld

• Je bent vloeiend in Nederlands en Engels ; goede kennis Frans is een pluspunt




Ons aanbod

• Uitdagende Data projecten in een entrepreneurial omgeving

• De kans om ons AI & Data departement verder uit te bouwen en onze interne werking te optimaliseren

• Onze L&D Manager begeleidt je richting passende opleidingen en nieuwe certificaten

• Team events waarbij je andere Data consultants beter leert kennen, en bijleert van elkaar

• Salarispakket op maat inclusief bedrijfswagen, laadpas, maaltijdcheques, groeps- en hospitalisatieverzekering, 32 vakantiedagen, Flex Income Plan

Title: Machine Learning Engineer
Description:
ML OPS Engineer / AI Engineer

About NORRIQ

NORRIQ is an international group based in Denmark and Belgium, comprising over 350 consultants dedicated to unlocking the full business potential of companies through technology and digital transformation.

We have a specialized Financial Services practice that is experiencing rapid growth. Over 100 consultants focus exclusively on the financial services sector, assisting banks and insurances in redesigning their operations to meet changing client expectations, adopt new technologies, and adhere to evolving regulations (DORA, RIS, AI Act, AML, KYC, etc).

At NORRIQ, our employees are at the heart of our organization and our success.. We hire and nurture passionate individuals who strive for excellence for both our clients and colleagues. Our culture supports personal and professional growth with training, opportunities, and creative freedom. Regardless of when you join or how long you stay, you'll experience an unforgettable NORRIQ journey and become a part of our extended family. Connected forever!

Role Overview

As an MLOps Engineer / AI Engineer, you will play a central role in bridging Data Science and IT Operations. You will design, deploy, and scale production-grade machine learning and AI solutions for our financial services clients. Your mission is to ensure robust, secure, and efficient AI operations—covering deployment, observability, lifecycle management, and continuous improvement.

This role is ideal for someone who loves building AI infrastructure, optimizing performance, and enabling data scientists to move faster and safer.

Key Responsibilities


Deploy ML/AI Models: Work with Data Scientists to deploy secure, scalable, and reliable models into production.
Build CI/CD Pipelines: Automate testing, packaging, and deployment for data and model workflows.
Manage Data Pipelines: Design and maintain efficient data flows across storage systems, databases, and platforms.
Set Up Environments: Manage dependencies, development environments, and tooling for smooth project onboarding.
Operate Kubernetes: Deploy and maintain containerized AI components using Kubernetes.
Monitor & Troubleshoot: Oversee model/application performance, resolve incidents, and conduct root-cause analyses.
Optimize & Innovate: Identify improvements, adopt new technologies, and enhance AI engineering practices.


Requirements

Education


Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
Strong background in programming, system engineering, or DevOps is highly valued.


Technical Skills


Strong proficiency in Python.
Experience with REST APIs and Git.
Hands-on expertise in CI/CD and MLOps/DevOps practices.
Practical experience with Docker and Kubernetes.
Familiarity with Linux, software testing, and modern software engineering workflows.
Nice to have: SQL/PostgreSQL, MLflow, Helm, or related tooling.


Soft Skills


Collaborative and team-oriented mindset.
Proactive, solution-driven, and comfortable working in dynamic environments.
Strong communication, analytical, and problem-solving abilities.


Languages


Fluent in English (spoken and written).
Knowledge of additional languages (Dutch or French) is a plus.


Why Joining Us?


You will be part of a fast growing international company with a unique people culture
A very competitive salary package including a company car, iPhone and different allowances
You will get extensive trainings in Belgium and Denmark on technical matters, as well as soft skills and project management, and you will have access to new technologies and innovative equipment.
You will join a dynamic and growing team with a great mix of young and experienced professionals focusing on financial services.

Title: Freelance Machine Learning Engineer
Description:
Please submit your CV in English and indicate your level of English proficiency.

Mindrift connects specialists with project-based AI opportunities for leading tech companies, focused on testing, evaluating, and improving AI systems. Participation is project-based, not permanent employment.

What This Opportunity Involves

While each project involves unique tasks, contributors may:


Design original computational STEM problems that simulate real scientific workflows
Create problems that require Python programming to solve
Ensure problems are computationally intensive and cannot be solved manually within reasonable timeframes (days/weeks)
Develop problems requiring non-trivial reasoning chains and creative problem-solving approaches
Verify solutions using Python with standard libraries (Numpy, Pandas, Scipy, scikit-learn)
Document problem statements clearly and provide verified correct answers


What We Look For

This opportunity is a good fit for ML specialists with an experience in python open to part-time, non-permanent projects. Ideally, contributors will have:


5+ years of hands-on machine learning experience with proven business impact
Portfolio of completed projects and publications showcasing real-world problem-solving
Expert Python programming for data science (pandas, numpy, scipy, scikit-learn, statsmodels)
Expert statistical analysis and machine learning - deep understanding of algorithms, methods, and their practical applications
Expert with SQL and database operations for data manipulation and analysis
Experience with GenAI technologies (LLMs, RAG, prompt engineering, vector databases)
Understanding of MLOps practices and model deployment workflows
Knowledge of modern frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch, LangChain)
Strong written English (C1+)


How It Works

Apply → Pass qualification(s) → Join a project → Complete tasks → Get paid

Project time expectations

For this project, tasks are estimated to require around 10-20 hours per week during active phases, based on project requirements. This is an estimate, not a guaranteed workload, and applies only while the project is active.

Compensation

On this project, contributors can earn up to $58 per hour equivalent, depending on their level and pace of contribution.

Compensation varies across projects depending on scope, complexity, and required expertise. Please note that other projects on the platform may offer different earning levels based on their requirements.

Title: Data Scientist
Description:
🚀 Data Scientist (Computer Vision & NLP) | Relocate to Porto, Portugal | 1–4 Years Experience




Hey future innovator 👋

We’re on the hunt for a Data Scientist who’s obsessed with solving real-world problems using Computer Vision, NLP, and Deep Learning. If you’ve got 1–4 years of experience, right to work in EU, and a passion for building cool stuff with Python, we want to hear from you.




**You must be willing to relocate to Porto, Portugal - full relocation support**




Why work in iGaming with US?

Because you'll be building cutting-edge tech that powers entertainment for millions—where innovation meets impact, and your work directly shapes the future of digital gaming experiences.




What you’ll be doing:

Building smart ML models using image, text, audio & tabular data
Training pipelines in Azure and deploying end-to-end apps in Python
Creating tools for model inference, logging, and performance tracking
Collaborating with data and engineering teams to solve complex challenges
Staying ahead of the curve with the latest in LLMs, RAG, and CV/NLP trends




What you bring:

Solid Python skills + experience with PyTorch or TensorFlow
Hands-on with Docker, CI/CD, and testing frameworks like Pytest
Experience with model tracking, versioning, and performance metrics
Bonus points if you’ve worked with Azure ML, Huggingface, or LangChain




What’s in it for you:

💸 Competitive salary
📚 Training on industry best practices
🌍 Remote-first culture with a global team
🚀 Growth opportunities in a fast-moving tech company




If you’re ready to level up your career and build cutting-edge solutions with a team that values innovation, apply now! 🌟




Remote (EU only) | Must have right to work

Title: Data Scientist H/F
Description:
MCA BELGIUM, filiale du groupe français MCA, est une société de conseil en ingénierie et hautes technologies. Avec plus de 15 ans d’expérience en Belgique, nous accompagnons nos clients dans la réalisation de projets industriels complexes dans divers secteurs d’activité (énergie, nucléaire, pharmaceutique, aéronautique, ferroviaire).

Nous rejoindre, c’est intégrer une entreprise dynamique qui place l’accompagnement de ses collaborateurs au cœur de ses priorités. Vous bénéficierez d’un suivi personnalisé et de nombreuses formations pour développer vos compétences.

Votre Rôle

Rattaché(e) au pôle Data & Engineering, vous intervenez sur l’exploitation avancée de données industrielles issues d’équipements d’énergies renouvelables (solaire & éolien), avec pour objectif d’optimiser la performance des installations et d’anticiper les défaillances :


Analyse de données provenant de machines industrielles (production, capteurs, historiques de fonctionnement)
Conception et développement de modèles statistiques et algorithmiques (machine learning, détection d’anomalies)
Identification des pertes de performance, anomalies et risques de panne
Participation à la mise en place de solutions de maintenance prédictive
Contribution à l’optimisation du potentiel des équipements
Restitution des résultats via rapports techniques et documentation associée
Collaboration avec les équipes multidisciplinaires (ingénierie, experts terrain, métiers)
Veille sur les évolutions technologiques et méthodologiques en data science appliquée à l’industrie


Votre Profil


Diplôme d’ingénieur ou formation équivalente, idéalement avec une spécialisation en data science, mathématiques appliquées ou domaine proche
Première expérience professionnelle en data (stage long, VIE ou premier poste accepté), avec exposition concrète à des projets data
Maîtrise de Python
Bonne compréhension des algorithmes, statistiques et approches machine learning
Esprit analytique, rigueur et sens du travail en équipe
Maîtrise du français & anglais professionnel


Vos Perspectives D’évolution

Nous souhaitons vous accompagner dans votre montée en compétences. Notre objectif est de vous donner toutes les clés pour réussir et accéder aux différentes opportunités d’évolution. Vous pourrez évoluer vers des fonctions techniques, de gestion de projet ou de management. Ce poste est ouvert aux personnes en situation de handicap.

HTML:
MCA BELGIUM, filiale du groupe français MCA, est une société de conseil en ingénierie et hautes technologies. Avec plus de 15 ans d’expérience en Belgique, nous accompagnons nos clients dans la réalisation de projets industriels complexes dans divers secteurs d’activité (énergie, nucléaire, pharmaceutique, aéronautique, ferroviaire).

Nous rejoindre, c’est intégrer une entreprise dynamique qui place l’accompagnement de ses collaborateurs au cœur de ses priorités. Vous bénéficierez d’un suivi personnalisé et de nombreuses formations pour développer vos compétences.

Votre Rôle

Rattaché(e) au pôle Data & Engineering, vous intervenez sur l’exploitation avancée de données industrielles issues d’équipements d’énergies renouvelables (solaire & éolien), avec pour objectif d’optimiser la performance des installations et d’anticiper les défaillances :

  • Analyse de données provenant de machines industrielles (production, capteurs, historiques de fonctionnement)
  • Conception et développement de modèles statistiques et algorithmiques (machine learning, détection d’anomalies)
  • Identification des pertes de performance, anomalies et risques de panne
  • Participation à la mise en place de solutions de maintenance prédictive
  • Contribution à l’optimisation du potentiel des équipements
  • Restitution des résultats via rapports techniques et documentation associée
  • Collaboration avec les équipes multidisciplinaires (ingénierie, experts terrain, métiers)
  • Veille sur les évolutions technologiques et méthodologiques en data science appliquée à l’industrie

Votre Profil

  • Diplôme d’ingénieur ou formation équivalente, idéalement avec une spécialisation en data science, mathématiques appliquées ou domaine proche
  • Première expérience professionnelle en data (stage long, VIE ou premier poste accepté), avec exposition concrète à des projets data
  • Maîtrise de Python
  • Bonne compréhension des algorithmes, statistiques et approches machine learning
  • Esprit analytique, rigueur et sens du travail en équipe
  • Maîtrise du français & anglais professionnel

Vos Perspectives D’évolution

Nous souhaitons vous accompagner dans votre montée en compétences. Notre objectif est de vous donner toutes les clés pour réussir et accéder aux différentes opportunités d’évolution. Vous pourrez évoluer vers des fonctions techniques, de gestion de projet ou de management. Ce poste est ouvert aux personnes en situation de handicap.

Title: Machine Learning Engineer
Description:
🎉 Join the Future of Fun! Become a Machine Learning Engineer in the iGaming Industry! 🎉

Are you a tech wizard with a passion for working with cool tech? If so, we have the perfect opportunity for you! We’re on the hunt for a Machine Learning Engineer to join our dynamic team in the thrilling world of iGaming. As a key player in our innovative team, you’ll be diving into the latest ML algorithms, crafting intelligent systems that enhance customer experience, and pushing the boundaries of what’s possible in the iGaming universe.




This role requires you to have the right to work in Europe no work visa on offer




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Design, develop and maintain ML pipelines, ensuring high reliability and scalability.
Implement scalable machine learning infrastructure, to deploy advanced algorithms based on image, text, audio and tabular data.
Optimize trained AI models (latency, memory, throughput, ...)
Develop CI/CD pipelines and containerize production applications
Automate existing workflows withing Data Science team
Monitor and troubleshoot production ML systems to ensure smooth operation using alert systems.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams across data and engineering to come up with solutions to complex problem statements.
Lead research initiatives to explore new methodologies, tools, and technologies, and contribute to the development of best ML OPs practices within the company.







REQUIRED SKILLS AND QUALIFICATIONS




Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
Strong proficiency in Python, with extensive experience in PyTorch or TensorFlow.
Extensive knowledge of key machine learning metrics and optimization techniques.
Strong knowledge of version control systems (Git, data versioning, ...).
Experience in model management and experiment tracking frameworks
Strong knowledge and practical understanding of different ML Ops techniques.
Prior experience in handling very large datasets across different business functions.
Practical experience of deploying and monitoring scalable machine learning models in real-world applications.
Prior experience in CI/CD pipelines, containerization, scheduling and automation.
Prior experience in designing production ready and large-scale AI/ML systems end-to-end in a very fast-paced environment.
Excellent problem-solving, analytical, and communication skills.
Self-motivated individual who can work independently, and stay updated on updated with the latest advancements in AI, deep learning, generative AI and related system design areas.







PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS:




Extensive experience with Azure ecosystem, in particular Azure Machine Learning.
Experience developing computer vision, text, audio, and/or tabular data models.
Strong proficiency in Gitlab CI, Jenkins, Grafana, Docker.
Excellent software engineering skills in API design and development, and concurrency design skills.




If you are a skilled Machine Learning Enginner who has passion to work in a fast-paced environment, have an eye for details and ready to experiment new things, we encourage you to apply and be part of our dynamic and innovative team and organization.

Title: AI OPS Engineer (✨ immediate start ✨)
Description:
This is a Senior Platform Engineering role with an AI infrastructure focus — not an ML or data science role.







About Us




We are a venture builder creating purpose-driven, evidence-led startups.




We work hands-on with ventures from early validation through scale-up, providing shared infrastructure, operational excellence, and execution discipline — while keeping ventures autonomous and founder-led.




Our model is decentralized and pragmatic:




flat hierarchies
strong ownership
decisions grounded in data







The venture builder exists to accelerate execution, not to centralize power or slow teams down.




Most companies are running AI like it's 2023 — ad hoc tools, no cost attribution, no safety guarantees. We're building the infrastructure layer that changes that.

As our AI Ops Engineer, you'll own the platform that makes AI productive, safe, and economically rational across every team — engineering, product, and operations. This isn't tool configuration. It's building the operating layer that determines how fast our company can learn, ship, and compound.




Why this role exists




AI-assisted development has crossed the threshold from experiment to production system. But most companies are still running AI like it's 2023: ad hoc tool adoption, no cost attribution, no safety guarantees, no cross-team consistency. That's not a tooling gap — it's an infrastructure gap.

The AI Ops Engineer closes it.

You'll own the platform that makes AI productive, safe, and economically rational across every team — engineering, product, operations, and beyond. You're not configuring tools. You're building the operating layer that determines how fast this company can learn, ship, and compound.

If a Context Engineer makes AI effective within a codebase, the AI Ops Engineer makes AI effective everywhere — across repos, teams, workflows, and business functions.

This is one of the highest-leverage roles in the company.




What you'll own




AI-native CI/CD with quality, safety, and intelligence gates
Cross-repo agent infrastructure (Claude Code, MCP servers, shared context libraries)
Multi-model routing strategy and provider management
Token spend visibility and cost-per-outcome optimization
Internal automation workflows (n8n and beyond)
Security scanning and AI-specific risk management
Safe AI enablement for non-technical teams







You're likely a fit if




You automate your own workflows unprompted, have strong opinions about pipeline architecture, and get genuine satisfaction from systems that quietly work at scale.







Core background




DevOps, Platform Engineering, or Developer Experience — with deep CI/CD fluency, strong scripting ability, and an observability mindset. LLM API experience and familiarity with agent tooling are a strong plus.




This role reports to the VP of Engineering / CTO and has direct ownership of AI tooling spend. Compensation is benchmarked against senior platform engineering roles.

We're not hiring someone to keep the lights on. We're hiring someone to build the power plant.







Compensation philosophy




This role sits at the intersection of infrastructure, AI, and company-wide leverage. Compensation reflects that — it's benchmarked against senior platform engineering roles, not junior DevOps.







The mindset we're hiring for




This is not "keep the lights on." This is build the power plant — then make it reliable, safe, observable, scalable, and intelligent.




You'll be trusted with systems that influence how code gets written, reviewed, and shipped. How risk is controlled. How costs are managed. How quickly the entire company can learn, adapt, and execute.




Every team's ceiling is partly determined by the platform you build. Every dollar of AI spend either compounds or evaporates based on the infrastructure you design.




If that sounds exciting — if you want to build the platform that makes everyone else sharper, faster, and more capable — this role is for you.







Ideawise is an equal opportunity employer.

Title: Software Engineer
Description:
Role Overview

We are looking for Software Engineers to work with a leading Frontier LLM Lab to help accelerate their Agentic Data Cloud roadmap by building and scaling tools for next-generation AI-powered data systems. You will work on developing MCP tools, improving AI-assisted developer workflows, and expanding platform capabilities across the Data Cloud ecosystem.

Key Responsibilities

Build and enhance MCP tools for both proprietary and open-source environments
Expand test coverage for tools used by AI coding assistants (e.g., Gemini CLI, Claude Code)
Refactor, maintain, and improve existing test frameworks and codebases
Convert technical blogs into production-ready sample code and documentation
Develop real-world data applications (e.g., using QueryData) to support product R&D and experimentation
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to accelerate adoption of agentic AI capabilities

Must-Have Requirements

Minimum of 4–8 years of software engineering experience
Strong proficiency in Python or Go (ideally both)
Solid experience with SQL (intermediate minimum)
Prior experience working in Google3 / Google engineering environments
Experience building or contributing to agentic AI systems
Hands-on experience with AI coding tools (e.g., Claude Code, Gemini CLI)
Strong coding, testing, and debugging skills
Good technical writing and documentation skills

Nice-to-Have

Experience contributing to open-source projects on GitHub (at least some team members expected)
Advanced SQL expertise (preferred for some team members)

Perks of Freelancing With Turing:

Work in a fully remote environment.
Opportunity to work on cutting-edge AI projects with leading LLM companies.
Potential for contract extension based on performance and project needs.

Commitments Required : 8 hours per day with an overlap of 6 hours with PST

Title: AI Engineer
Description:
Company Description

Sopra Steria biedt op maat gemaakte end-to-end corporate technolgy en software solutions aan die organisaties helpen gedurfde keuzes te maken en resultaten te boeken. En met succes! Met meer dan 51.000 collega’s in bijna 30 landen behoren we tot de top van de Europese digital solutions leveranciers. Succesvolle organisaties in Europa vertrouwen op onze technologie omdat we blijven streven naar innovatie, samenwerking en zakelijke ontwikkeling.

The world is how we shape it. Let’s shape it together.

Job Description

Maak deel uit van ons Data & AI-team.

Je komt terecht in een multidisciplinair team waar data engineering, architectuur, AI, analytics, governance en visualisatie samenkomen. Samen helpen we klanten om meer waarde uit hun data te halen: van het opzetten van de juiste datafundamenten tot het bouwen van dashboards, analytics-oplossingen en AI-use cases die betere beslissingen ondersteunen.

Als AI Engineer draag je hieraan bij door AI-oplossingen te ontwerpen, bouwen en industrialiseren die concrete businessproblemen oplossen en gebruikt kunnen worden in echte operationele omgevingen.

Je brengt traditionele AI en generatieve AI naar concrete praktijktoepassingen door onze klanten te helpen bij het ontwerpen, bouwen en deployen van AI-oplossingen. Je werkt aan oplossingen gaande van machine learning-modellen en NLP tot LLM’s, semantic search, RAG-oplossingen en conversational AI.

Je traint, fine-tunet, verbetert en deployt ML- en AI-modellen. Je schrijft productieklare Python-code voor online, batch- en realtime modellen, en je bouwt applicaties en softwarecomponenten die AI-gedreven use cases bruikbaar maken in de praktijk.

Je werkt nauw samen met Data Scientists, MLOps Engineers, Data Engineers, AI Architects en andere specialisten om alle onderdelen van de oplossing te integreren. Afhankelijk van het project help je nieuwe AI-oplossingen van nul op te bouwen, of ondersteun je klanten bij het beheren en verbeteren van bestaande oplossingen op middellange tot lange termijn.

Binnen ons Data & AI-team helpen we elkaar groeien en blijven we van elkaar leren. Zoek je een rol waarin je AI engineering, software development, MLOps en toegepaste innovatie kan combineren? Dan is het Data & AI-team bij Sopra Steria de juiste plek voor jou.

Qualifications

We zoeken een AI Engineer die sterke AI-kennis combineert met solide software engineering skills. Je kan verder gaan dan experimentatie en helpt AI-use cases om te zetten in betrouwbare, onderhoudbare en productieklare oplossingen.

Je beschikt over kennis en ervaring in het volgende:


Minimaal 3 jaar ervaring als Machine Learning Engineer, Data Scientist, MLOps Engineer of in een vergelijkbare functie
Ervaring met traditionele NLP, LLM’s en conversational AI, zowel in de experimenteerfase als in productie
Ervaring met vector databases voor semantisch zoeken en RAG-oplossingen in een productieomgeving
Sterke software engineering achtergrond en in staat om productieklare code te schrijven in Python
Ervaring met experiment tracking, model monitoring, LLM- en NLP-evaluatietechnieken en deploymentstrategieën
Vertrouwd met de machine learning lifecycle en MLOps- en DevOps-principes
Ervaring met ten minste één cloudprovider en goede kennis van het data-ecosysteem
In staat om anderen te coachen, technisch advies en richting te geven, en zelfstandig te werken
Master of PhD in Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence, Computer Engineering of een gerelateerd domein
Vloeiend in het Engels. Je spreekt daarnaast ook vloeiend Nederlands en/of Frans


Dit mag je verwachten

Bij Sopra Steria maak je deel uit van onze Data Science & AI Engineering Practice binnen het Data & AI-team: een gespecialiseerde groep consultants die klanten helpt om AI-ideeën om te zetten in praktische, schaalbare en verantwoorde oplossingen.

Ons werk gaat verder dan experimentatie. We helpen organisaties waardevolle AI-use cases te identificeren, de juiste oplossingsaanpak te bepalen, AI-systemen te bouwen en te industrialiseren, en ze te verankeren in echte business- en operationele omgevingen. Dit omvat onder meer traditionele AI, NLP, LLM’s, generatieve AI, agentic AI, trustworthy AI en MLOps.

Je bouwt je expertise verder uit in AI engineering, Python development, productieklare AI, cloud- en dataplatformen, MLOps, modelevaluatie en stakeholder collaboration. Dat doe je in een samenwerkend team waar kennisdeling, technische deep dives en coaching deel uitmaken van onze manier van werken.

Als deel van Sopra Steria profiteer je ook van sterke doorgroeimogelijkheden, zowel lokaal als internationaal, ondersteund door de Sopra Steria Academy en een breder netwerk van meer dan 51.000 professionals.

Additional Information

We bieden een aantrekkelijk voordelenpakket, waaronder:


Een waaier aan extralegale voordelen, zoals mobiliteitsopties (inclusief een bedrijfswagen), verzekeringsdekking, maaltijdcheques, ecocheques en meer.
Voortdurende leermogelijkheden via de Sopra Steria Academy zodat je je professioneel kan blijven ontwikkelen.
De kans om je collega’s van Sopra Steria te ontmoeten tijdens diverse teamevents.


Lijkt deze job iets voor jou?

Ben je klaar om met ons de wereld vorm te geven? Fantastisch! We kijken nu al uit naar jouw sollicitatie.

______

Sopra Steria is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will be considered for employment without regard to age, ancestry, nationality, color, family or medical leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, immigration status, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran or military status, race, ethnicity, religion, gender (including pregnancy), sexual orientation or any other characteristic protected by applicable local laws, regulations and ordinances. We foster a work environment that is inclusive and respectful of all differences.

Dit omvat onder meer traditionele AI, NLP, LLM’s, generatieve AI, agentic AI, trustworthy AI en MLOps.

Je bouwt je expertise verder uit in AI engineering, Python development, productieklare AI, cloud- en dataplatformen, MLOps, modelevaluatie en stakeholder collaboration. Dat doe je in een samenwerkend team waar kennisdeling, technische deep dives en coaching deel uitmaken van onze manier van werken.

Als deel van Sopra Steria profiteer je ook van sterke doorgroeimogelijkheden, zowel lokaal als internationaal, ondersteund door de Sopra Steria Academy en een breder netwerk van meer dan 51.000 professionals.

Additional Information

We bieden een aantrekkelijk voordelenpakket, waaronder:

  • Een waaier aan extralegale voordelen, zoals mobiliteitsopties (inclusief een bedrijfswagen), verzekeringsdekking, maaltijdcheques, ecocheques en meer.
  • Voortdurende leermogelijkheden via de Sopra Steria Academy zodat je je professioneel kan blijven ontwikkelen.
  • De kans om je collega’s van Sopra Steria te ontmoeten tijdens diverse teamevents.

Lijkt deze job iets voor jou?

Ben je klaar om met ons de wereld vorm te geven? Fantastisch! We kijken nu al uit naar jouw sollicitatie.

______

Sopra Steria is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will be considered for employment without regard to age, ancestry, nationality, color, family or medical leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, immigration status, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran or military status, race, ethnicity, religion, gender (including pregnancy), sexual orientation or any other characteristic protected by applicable local laws, regulations and ordinances. We foster a work environment that is inclusive and respectful of all differences.

Title: BE - Data Scientist
Description:
Overview

Who are we?

CBTW is a global tech solutions company.

We empower businesses with tailored tech and business solutions that drive innovation and sustainable growth.

With over 2 500 experts across 21 countries, we deliver results through flexible engagement models like: whether augmenting teams, managing complex projects, or building long-term operations.

Thanks to our 5 service lines, we specialize in:


AI & Data Platforms,
Cloud & Enterprise Platforms,
Cybersecurity,
Software Engineering,
Strategy, Product & Transformation.


More info on our website: https://cbtw.tech/

What service line will you be part of?

As a Data Scientist, you will join our AI & Data Platforms expertise.

AI & Data Platforms is CBTW's service line dedicated to supporting organizations in leveraging their data and fulfilling their AI ambitions to achieve tangible results. We focus on adoption and measurable impact from day one, combining our comprehensive, end-to-end expertise with our ecosystem of leading partners such as SAS, Snowflake, Microsoft and Databricks.

Our clients rely on us to support with:


Data Platform modernisation, migration and optimisation
AI-driven Business Insights & Customer Analytics
Cutting-edge GenAI products & Agentic AI automation
Unified Data Platform & Cloud Infrastructure
Data & AI Governance
BI & Analytics for business teams


Responsibilities

What is your role?

You will be part of a journey where you will have two impacts: a client impact and an internal impact. For the internal impact, based on your skills and time, you will be joining our internal data community at CBTW, to share knowledge and best practices. For the client impact, tasks can vary depending on the client and the project, but as a Data Engineer, you will mainly:


Mining both structured and unstructured data to identify patterns and provide information through predictive models
Explore and collect data from multiple sources to apply or develop analytical ad statistical methods and machine learning models
Apply statistics and machine learning algorithms to discover patterns in datasets


Qualifications

What are we offering?

EVOLUTION:


A career development expert will follow up on your professional path within the company and support you in shaping and growing your career,
Catalogue with a wide variety of trainings for hard and soft skills, private language classes, unlimited access to an E-learning platform (Udemy, Code Academy... ) and possibility to get certified every year,
Training days credits.


COLLABORATION:


You will join a community of [job title] experts where colleagues support each other on projects, share knowledge through workshops and events to keep learning and evolving, and build international connections, while also enjoying great moments and drinks together,
Participate in internal projects to innovate and develop our solutions portfolio,
Join one of our collectives (Wellness, Agile, RSE, Gaming ...) and share your interests with other positive thinkers,
You’ll also enjoy several unforgettable company parties throughout the year. Events that CBTW has truly mastered the art of organizing.


ON TOP OF THAT:


We offer a competitive salary with a flexible mobility package that allows you to choose options such as having mobility benefits (electric cars, electric bikes, public transportation subscription).


Your next adventure starts at CBTW!

Do you see a match? We would love to see your application coming in! 😉

Title: Data Scientist - Tribe AI - HQ Brussels
Description:
YOUR JOB IN A NUTSHELL

The Tribe Artificial Intelligence aims to deliver an efficient and seamless banking experience for our customers and empower our employees through AI. Our expert team of approximately 100 experts includes Data Scientists, AI Engineers, Business Analysts, Scrum Masters, Product Owners and Managers. We are seeking a Data Scientist with a minimum of 3 years of experience in developing AI applications, including both generative and traditional AI.

AND IN DETAIL


You develop AI applications to address various business challenges, including virtual assistants to enhance client experiences, advanced AI tools to support employee efficiency and creativity, and automating and optimizing internal processes.
You use various analytical methods, including large language models (prompt engineering, RAG, fine-tuning, …), Speech AI, agentic AI, image generation and interpretation, and classical statistical/machine learning techniques. While we don't expect you to be an expert in all areas, you should possess very strong expertise in core technologies and the ability to learn new methods as required.
You ensure scientific rigor in delivered solutions by applying robust methodologies, evaluating model generalization performance, adopting data-centric approaches through error analysis and data curation or augmentation, selecting relevant frameworks, and adhering to responsible AI guideline.
You present the results of your work directly to stakeholders and managers.
You contribute to deploying AI applications in production using a comprehensive stack of tools.
You access one of the richest volumes of varied data in the market and apply your skills to it.
You evolve in an environment where innovation and lean processes are praised, straight-forward communication is encouraged, and peers understand the meaning of team up.
You work with a team of colleagues in an Agile organization who are ready to collaborate and to share their experience.


YOUR TALENTS AND COMPETENCES


You hold at least a Master’s degree in a quantitative field like statistics, computer science or engineering, with a focus on natural language processing. A PhD is advantageous. Candidates from other academic backgrounds with strong analytics knowledge are also welcome.
You have a minimum of 3 years’ experience in data science, preferably in the financial sector, though less experience may be accepted if your academic achievements are substantial.
You are fluent in English and have a good command of French and/or Dutch.
You are proficient in Python for model building and understand ML engineering fundamentals (e.g., versioning systems) to produce code ready for CI/CD pipelines.


What We Have To Offer

OUR IMPACT

We strongly believe in the positive impact that the financial sector can have on the world. BNP Paribas Fortis offers sustainable and responsible investment products and solutions and encourages social entrepreneurship. Together with our customers, we are working towards a better future every day.

YOUR CAREER PERSPECTIVES

We offer a wide range of training courses, workshops and webinars to choose from depending on your availability, interests and goals.

OUR OFFER

In addition to your remuneration and benefits (meal vouchers, insurance, holidays), we offer flexible salary options, allowing you to convert part of your salary into personalised benefits (phone use, IT equipment, transport, etc.).

OUR ENGAGEMENT

At BNP Paribas Fortis, we want to attract and retain all talent, whatever their gender, age, background or sexual orientation, and irrespective of whether they are living with a disability, as every person has their own experiences and their own identity. All of our full-time vacancies are also open to candidates wishing to work on an 80% or 90% full-time equivalent basis.

If the function is categorized as a banking services provider function (cf. Law of 22 April 2019 establishing an oath and a disciplinary regime for the banking sector), you will also need to provide us with a 'certificate of absence of professional ban' from the FSMA confirming that you are not professionally disqualified.

TEMPTED BY THE CHALLENGE?

A first selection is made based on your CV and motivation letter. Are we convinced that you are the right candidate? Then we will contact you. Good luck!

Is this position not for you, but do you know someone who is cut out for this job? Feel free to share it with friends and family!

Title: Senior Data Scientist - ML Engineer
Description:
About Devoteam:

Devoteam is a leading consulting firm focused on digital transformation. We help our clients leverage technology to achieve their business goals.

Our longstanding partnerships with leaders like AWS, Google Cloud, Microsoft, and ServiceNow amplify our capabilities, allowing us to deliver top-tier expertise and award-winning services. We complement these partnerships with in-depth Cyber, Data & AI, Software development and multi cloud expertise.

For 30 years, we have always been guiding our customers on the next tech wave. Devoteam has guided organizations through the Internet and cloud. The next revolution? AI.

With 11,000 tech natives working in 25+ countries, we bring you highly skilled IT experts across Europe

At Devoteam, tech is in our DNA, and it’s the people we empower with tech. Now, with responsible AI, we’re ready to unlock a future where technology drives positive change.

Job Description

About the Role:

We are seeking a highly motivated and experienced Senior Data Scientist - ML Engineer to join our growing Data & AI team (50 FTE) in Belgium. In this role, you will play a key part in designing, developing, and deploying machine learning solutions for our clients across various industries. You will collaborate with other data scientists, engineers, and consultants to deliver innovative and impactful solutions that address our clients' business challenges.

Responsibilities:


Design, develop, and deploy machine learning models and algorithms
Analyze large and complex datasets to identify patterns and insights
Build and maintain data pipelines for data ingestion, processing, and transformation
Collaborate with stakeholders to understand business requirements and translate them into technical solutions
Stay up to date with the latest advancements in machine learning and artificial intelligence
Contribute to the development of Devoteam's data science and machine learning capabilities



Qualifications

Qualifications:


Master's degree or Ph.D. in Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or a related field
5+ years of experience in a data science or machine learning role
Strong programming skills in Python or R
Experience with machine learning frameworks such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, or scikit-learn
Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP
Experience with Databricks is a plus
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
Fluent in English and proficiency in Dutch or French is mandatory.
Sponsorship for a work permit not possible



Bonus Points:


Experience with big data technologies such as Hadoop, Spark, or Hive
Experience with MLOps tools and practices
Experience with natural language processing or computer vision
Contributions to open-source projects or publications in relevant conferences or journals



Additional Information

Why choose us?


Thrive in a fast-growing, entrepreneurial environment
Work with innovative and impactful Cloud, Data & AI projects for industry-leading clients
Connect with extraordinary talents in a collaborative and diverse culture
Enjoy a healthy work-life balance in an inspiring, eco-friendly workplace
Competitive compensation package



At Devoteam, we combine strong values – respect, frankness, ambition, entrepreneurship & collaboration – with a fun and supportive environment that empowers you to innovate, grow, and succeed in the fast-paced world of Cloud, Data & AI.

Title: Senior Data Scientist
Description:
Mission Overview:

Keystone Solutions is seeking a Senior Data Scientist for a consultancy mission at a client site. This role involves accelerating strategic data initiatives through expertise, technical direction, and coaching, while managing a continuous stream of ad-hoc data requests by prioritizing and translating them into reusable solutions and data products.

Core Responsibilities:


Strategic Projects & Technical Leadership: Take the technical lead in complex data projects (e.g., advanced analytics, graph/network analytics, integrations, architectural choices). Shape the approach, solutioning, and priorities of larger initiatives with a focus on feasibility, impact, and scalability. Ensure and promote quality standards, including reproducibility, documentation, methodology, and engineering quality where relevant.
Team Uplift & Co-Creation: Coach and guide data scientists and analysts through co-creation, content reviews, and sharing best practices. Contribute structurally to enhancing team competencies (methodology, approach, quality, communication). Actively participate in developing team agreements, such as definition of done, work formats, and knowledge sharing.
Structuring and Productizing Ad-Hoc Requests: Create an overview of incoming requests: intake, slicing, prioritization, status/communication. Cluster ad-hoc work and convert it into structural, reusable solutions (reusable datasets, analysis methods, templates, data products). Apply FAIR principles from a data product perspective with a focus on reusability and quality.
Project Management & Follow-Up: Take on basic delivery/project follow-up (scope, milestones, dependencies, risks). Support the team leader in follow-up and coordination to bring stability to planning and execution. Contribute to stakeholder alignment, including expectation management, decision-making, and escalations when necessary.



Collaboration & Stakeholders:

Work closely within the Data Mining team (data scientists/analysts, and where relevant data engineers/platform stakeholders). Collaborate with the Data Platform team and content partners/stakeholders. Operate in an environment with multiple priorities, requiring structure in intake, follow-up, and communication.

Profile (Must-Haves):


Master's degree in IT.
Strong hands-on experience as a Data Scientist / ML Engineer with a focus on Python.
Experience with data analysis and modeling (pandas, scikit-learn) and building/improving ML models in a production context.
Strong software engineering foundation: Git, code reviews, CI/CD pipelines, Docker; experience in setting up APIs and reusable components (e.g., FastAPI).
Knowledge of SQL; experience with infrastructure-as-code or cloud is a plus (Terraform, AWS/GCP).
Strong ability to structure unclear questions and translate them into concrete approaches/deliverables.
Experience with coaching/mentoring and working in co-creation (e.g., technical training, reviews, SCRUM/scrum master role).
Strong communication skills (engaging stakeholders, clear reporting, managing expectations).
Trilingual (NL/FR/EN) strongly desired, preferably at a high level.



Plus Points (Nice-to-Haves):


Experience with data product thinking, governance, and quality principles (FAIR, definitions, documentation, reusability).
Experience with graph analytics/network analytics or other advanced analytics domains.
Knowledge of Databricks.
Previous experience within an OISZ is a significant plus.
Previous experience with secondary data use and fraud detection.



Expected Impact (3-6 months):


Clearer intake and prioritization process for ad-hoc requests to the Data Mining team.
More reusable and scalable outputs instead of one-offs.
Measurable uplift in team quality through coaching, reviews, and methodological agreements.
Better predictability and progress on key data projects and strategic initiatives.

Mission Overview:

Keystone Solutions is seeking a Senior Data Scientist for a consultancy mission at a client site. This role involves accelerating strategic data initiatives through expertise, technical direction, and coaching, while managing a continuous stream of ad-hoc data requests by prioritizing and translating them into reusable solutions and data products.

Core Responsibilities:

  • Strategic Projects & Technical Leadership: Take the technical lead in complex data projects (e.g., advanced analytics, graph/network analytics, integrations, architectural choices). Shape the approach, solutioning, and priorities of larger initiatives with a focus on feasibility, impact, and scalability. Ensure and promote quality standards, including reproducibility, documentation, methodology, and engineering quality where relevant.
  • Team Uplift & Co-Creation: Coach and guide data scientists and analysts through co-creation, content reviews, and sharing best practices. Contribute structurally to enhancing team competencies (methodology, approach, quality, communication). Actively participate in developing team agreements, such as definition of done, work formats, and knowledge sharing.
  • Structuring and Productizing Ad-Hoc Requests: Create an overview of incoming requests: intake, slicing, prioritization, status/communication. Cluster ad-hoc work and convert it into structural, reusable solutions (reusable datasets, analysis methods, templates, data products). Apply FAIR principles from a data product perspective with a focus on reusability and quality.
  • Project Management & Follow-Up: Take on basic delivery/project follow-up (scope, milestones, dependencies, risks). Support the team leader in follow-up and coordination to bring stability to planning and execution. Contribute to stakeholder alignment, including expectation management, decision-making, and escalations when necessary.


Collaboration & Stakeholders:

Work closely within the Data Mining team (data scientists/analysts, and where relevant data engineers/platform stakeholders). Collaborate with the Data Platform team and content partners/stakeholders. Operate in an environment with multiple priorities, requiring structure in intake, follow-up, and communication.

Profile (Must-Haves):

  • Master's degree in IT.
  • Strong hands-on experience as a Data Scientist / ML Engineer with a focus on Python.
  • Experience with data analysis and modeling (pandas, scikit-learn) and building/improving ML models in a production context.
  • Strong software engineering foundation: Git, code reviews, CI/CD pipelines, Docker; experience in setting up APIs and reusable components (e.g., FastAPI).
  • Knowledge of SQL; experience with infrastructure-as-code or cloud is a plus (Terraform, AWS/GCP).
  • Strong ability to structure unclear questions and translate them into concrete approaches/deliverables.
  • Experience with coaching/mentoring and working in co-creation (e.g., technical training, reviews, SCRUM/scrum master role).
  • Strong communication skills (engaging stakeholders, clear reporting, managing expectations).
  • Trilingual (NL/FR/EN) strongly desired, preferably at a high level.


Plus Points (Nice-to-Haves):

  • Experience with data product thinking, governance, and quality principles (FAIR, definitions, documentation, reusability).
  • Experience with graph analytics/network analytics or other advanced analytics domains.
  • Knowledge of Databricks.
  • Previous experience within an OISZ is a significant plus.
  • Previous experience with secondary data use and fraud detection.


Expected Impact (3-6 months):

  • Clearer intake and prioritization process for ad-hoc requests to the Data Mining team.
  • More reusable and scalable outputs instead of one-offs.
  • Measurable uplift in team quality through coaching, reviews, and methodological agreements.
  • Better predictability and progress on key data projects and strategic initiatives.


If you are ready to tackle technical and strategic challenges in a dynamic consultancy environment, apply today at Keystone Solutions Career Portal.

Title: Machine Learning Engineer
HTML:
Wat mag je verwachten


Bij e5 Fashion draait alles rond onze klanten: begrijpen wat ze zoeken, hoe ze winkelen en hoe we hen nog beter kunnen inspireren en bedienen

.Als Machine Learning Engineer help jij ons om klantgedrag, verkoop, voorraad en assortiment slimmer te begrijpen. Je ontdekt patronen en verbanden in onze data die vandaag nog niet altijd zichtbaar zijn, en vertaalt die naar inzichten waarmee we betere beslissingen nemen voor onze klanten, boetieks en webshop. Zo bouw je mee aan een datagedreven e5, waar technologie en AI bijdragen aan een sterkere klantbeleving.


Een sleutelrol in een ambitieus data- en AI-traject binnen e5. Je analyseert data en ontdekt patronen, correlaties en inzichten die vandaag nog niet altijd zichtbaar zijn. Je onderzoekt welke factoren onze verkoop, voorraad, assortiment, klantbeleving en businessprocessen beïnvloeden, en vertaalt die inzichten naar concrete aanbevelingen. Je bouwt en verbetert Machine Learning-modellen rond thema’s zoals forecasting, segmentatie, aanbevelingen en optimalisatie. Daarbij denk je niet alleen technisch, maar ook businessgericht. Welke inzichten helpen ons om beter te sturen, slimmer te plannen of sneller bij te sturen? Je werkt nauw samen met collega’s uit verschillende teams en met een externe partner, zodat je kan sparren, groeien en mee bouwen aan ons data- en AI-platform. Dit is geen standaard ML-job. Je krijgt de kans om mee vorm te geven aan hoe e5 data en AI inzet in de praktijk, dicht bij de business met zichtbare impact op klanten, boetieks, webshop en resultaten. Je komt terecht in een omgeving met een sterk teamgevoel, hands-on mentaliteit, korte lijnen en collega’s met goesting om vooruit te gaan. We bieden je een marktconform loon met extralegale voordelen en personeelskorting op onze collectie, ook voor familie en vrienden.


Great style starts with great people


Bij e5 Fashion draait alles rond mensen - in wat ze dragen én in waar ze werk

en. Je komt terecht bij een fashionretailer in volle beweging, waar boetieks, webshop en ondersteunende teams elke dag samenwerken aan een sterkere klantbeleving. We houden van korte lijnen, duidelijke afspraken en oplossingen die werken in de praktijk .Je krijgt vertrouwen en verantwoordelijkheid, maar ook ruimte om mee richting te geven. We schakelen snel, denken vooruit en werken aan projecten die zichtbaar verschil maken voor onze klanten, collega’s en resultaten.


Waarom pas jij hier


  • Je hebt een master in een kwantitatieve richting, zoals Computer Science, Data Science, Engineering, Wiskunde, Econometrie of gelijkwaardig door ervaring;
  • Je hebt ervaring met Machine Learning, bijvoorbeeld forecasting, clustering, segmentatie of aanbevelingsmodellen;
  • Je werkt vlot met Python en SQL;
  • Je kan data kritisch analyseren en verbanden leggen die niet meteen zichtbaar zijn;
  • Je denkt mee over welke data, datapunten en KPI’s ons helpen om betere beslissingen te nemen voor klanten, boetieks en webshop;
  • Je bent nieuwsgierig, analytisch en durft hypotheses challengen;
  • Je vertaalt inzichten helder naar concrete verbeteringen of beslissingen;
  • Je werkt graag op het snijpunt van data, business en technologie;
  • Ervaring met cloud- of dataplatformen zoals BigQuery of GCP is een plus;
  • Kennis van data pipelines, MLOps of model deployment is een plus;
  • Affiniteit met retail, e-commerce, klantgedrag of voorraadbeheer is mooi meegenomen;
  • Je spreekt vlot Nederlands en Engels.

Title: Senior Data Scientist
Description:
Senior Data Scientist

Nordic Region (Stockholm, Copenhagen, Oslo or Helsinki) | Hybrid

Competitive Salary + Bonus + Benefits

Permanent




The Opportunity

We're supporting a growing organisation that is investing heavily in its Data & AI capabilities and is seeking an experienced Data Scientist to join its expanding team.




This position offers the opportunity to work on a variety of complex, high-impact projects across multiple industries, helping organisations leverage data, machine learning, and AI to improve decision-making, drive efficiency, and unlock new commercial opportunities.




The successful candidate will combine strong technical expertise with the ability to engage stakeholders, translate business challenges into analytical solutions, and communicate insights clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences.




Key Responsibilities

Develop and deploy machine learning and statistical models to solve real-world business challenges
Analyse large and complex datasets to identify trends, patterns, and actionable insights
Build predictive models that support strategic and operational decision-making
Collaborate with cross-functional teams including technology, business, product, and leadership stakeholders
Present findings and recommendations in a clear and commercially meaningful way
Support the design and implementation of AI and advanced analytics initiatives
Contribute to data strategy, model governance, and best-practice development
Continuously evaluate and improve model performance and effectiveness




What We're Looking For

Proven experience working as a Data Scientist or in a similar advanced analytics role
Strong proficiency in Python and relevant data science libraries (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-Learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch, etc.)
Strong understanding of machine learning, predictive analytics, and statistical modelling
Experience working with SQL and large-scale datasets
Exposure to cloud environments such as Azure, AWS, or GCP
Strong analytical and problem-solving capabilities
Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities simultaneously
Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills
Comfortable engaging with senior business leaders and translating technical concepts into business outcomes
Ability to influence decision-making through data-driven recommendations




Desirable Experience

Generative AI and Large Language Models (LLMs)
Natural Language Processing (NLP)
Databricks, Snowflake, or modern cloud data platforms
MLOps and model deployment frameworks
Data visualisation tools such as Power BI or Tableau
Experience working across financial services, technology, telecommunications, energy, or public sector environments




Why Apply?

Opportunity to work on varied and business-critical projects
Exposure to cutting-edge AI and machine learning initiatives
Collaborative and highly skilled team environment
Strong career progression opportunities
Flexible hybrid working model
Competitive compensation and benefits package




If you're passionate about turning data into meaningful business outcomes and enjoy working closely with stakeholders to solve complex challenges, we'd love to hear from you.

Title: Freelance Bot Developer (WhatsApp / Telegram / Discord)
Description:
Mindrift is looking for skilled Bot Developers (WhatsApp Business API, Telegram Bot API, Discord API) to join the Tendem project (https://tendem.ai/) and build conversational bots and messaging-platform integrations within our hybrid AI + human environment. In this role, as an AI Pilot - that's how we refer to this position at Mindrift - you'll collaborate with Tendem Agents that handle repetitive tasks, while you provide bot engineering expertise, conversational design judgment, and quality control to ensure bots are reliable, useful, and ready for real users. This part-time remote opportunity is ideal for professionals with hands-on experience building messaging bots, working with platform APIs and webhooks, and implementing conversational logic.

What We Do

The Mindrift platform connects specialists with AI projects from major tech innovators. Our mission is to unlock the potential of Generative AI by tapping into real-world expertise from across the globe.

About The Role

This is a freelance role for a Tendem project. As a Bot Developer, you'll design, build, and refine messaging bots across WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, and similar platforms — for use cases such as customer service, appointment booking, order taking, content delivery, moderation, and automated notifications.

Key Responsibilities


Build bots for WhatsApp (Business API / Cloud API), Telegram (Bot API), Discord, and similar messaging platforms
Design and implement conversational flows, dialogue state, and fallback handling
Integrate bots with LLMs (OpenAI, Anthropic, or similar) for natural language responses where appropriate
Connect bots to backend services, databases, CRMs, and third-party APIs (booking systems, payment, content sources)
Handle webhooks, rate limits, and platform-specific message formats (interactive messages, buttons, media, templates)
Evaluate AI-generated bot code and refactor it for correctness, reliability, and graceful error handling
Implement logging, monitoring, and recovery so bots stay healthy in production


Requirements And Benefits

Educational qualifications


At least 3 years of relevant experience backend, integration, automation, or bot development experience (required)
Bachelor's or Master's Degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Technology, or related technical fields is a plus


Academic and/or Professional Experience

Candidates should have a strong foundation in bot development, messaging platform integrations, and building reliable conversational workflows. We are looking for specialists who can design and maintain production-ready bots, work confidently with APIs, webhooks, and backend services, and refine AI-assisted output into stable, user-friendly experiences. Strong problem-solving skills, attention to detail, and the ability to work independently are essential.

Technical Skills (Essential)


At least 1 year of hands-on experience building bots for major messaging platforms (WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, Slack, or similar) is required
Strong command of Python or Node.js for backend bot logic
Solid experience with REST APIs, webhooks, OAuth, and async request handling
Experience with relational or NoSQL databases for storing conversation state and user data
Familiarity with LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic) and prompt design for conversational use is a strong plus
Understanding of platform-specific limits, message templates, and approval flows (e.g., WhatsApp template messages)
Experience with hosting and deployment (Docker, serverless, VPS, or PaaS)


Additional Requirements


Strong attention to detail and commitment to bot reliability — no silent failures, no broken flows
Self-directed work ethic with the ability to design and ship complete bots independently
Portfolio or examples of bots you've built (required)
English proficiency: Upper-intermediate (B2) or above (required)


Project time expectations

For this project, tasks are estimated to require around 10-20 hours per week during active phases, based on project requirements. This is an estimate, not a guaranteed workload, and applies only while the project is active.

Compensation

On this project, contributors can earn up to $60 per hour equivalent, depending on their level and pace of contribution.

Compensation varies across projects depending on scope, complexity, and required expertise. Please note that other projects on the platform may offer different earning levels based on their requirements.

Why this freelance opportunity might be a great fit for you?


Work fully remote on your own schedule with just a laptop and stable internet connection
Gain hands-on experience in a unique hybrid environment where human expertise and AI agents collaborate seamlessly — a distinctive skill set in a rapidly growing field
Participate in performance-based bonus programs that reward high-quality work and consistent delivery
Show more

Title: Data Scientist - GenAI
Description:
Join Artefact Belgium: Shape the Future of Generative AI and Large Language Models (LLMs)

Are you an early-career professional excited to harness the power of generative AI and Large Language Models (LLMs)? Artefact Belgium is seeking a Data Scientist - Gen AI to join our innovative team in Brussels. Our Belgian team specializes in LLM and GenAI projects, and this is your chance to work on cutting-edge solutions, collaborate with top-tier experts, and contribute to impactful projects in a dynamic, forward-thinking environment.

Who You Are

A recent graduate or professional with 1 to 3 years of experience, with hands-on experience working with LLMs and a passion for generative AI and NLP. Motivated to apply your technical expertise to real-world challenges in AI. Able to thrive in collaborative settings while independently driving your own workstreams. Eager to learn, grow, and push the boundaries of what's possible in AI innovation.

Who We Are

Artefact is a leading Data & AI consulting firm operating at the forefront of AI innovation. With a global presence, we help clients across industries—public health, manufacturing, etc. —leverage generative AI to achieve transformative outcomes. Our team in Belgium is specialized in LLM and GenAI projects, working on the most advanced applications of these technologies. At Artefact, we foster a culture of innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning, with a strong commitment to inclusivity and employee growth.

What You Will Do


Collaborate with the team to design, train, and fine-tune state-of-the-art models for client projects and internal tools.
Develop and integrate agentic AI solutions using tool calling, and emerging protocols like Model Context Protocol (MCP) to create autonomous, context-aware applications.
Research and implement innovative generative AI applications to solve complex business problems.
Design and implement comprehensive evaluation frameworks to measure LLM performance, establishing quality metrics and benchmarks that guide development decisions and ensure reliable, production-ready solutions.
Optimize the performance, scalability, and usability of LLM-powered products and tools.
Contribute to the deployment and maintenance of AI systems, including models, APIs, and supporting infrastructure.
Participate in technical discussions and brainstorming sessions to shape impactful solutions.


What You Bring


A degree in computer science, mathematics, engineering, physics, or a related field.
Experience working with LLMs, generative AI, or advanced NLP applications (e.g., fine-tuning models, using frameworks like Hugging Face or OpenAI).
Strong programming skills in Python and familiarity with AI and NLP libraries.
Analytical and problem-solving capabilities, with an ability to address real-world challenges through AI.
Good communication skills in English, Dutch or French; additional languages are a plus.
A growth mindset, adaptability, and eagerness to work in a fast-paced, cutting-edge environment.


What We Offer


A competitive salary with benefits tailored for early-career professionals.
Hands-on experience with state-of-the-art LLM technologies in impactful projects.
A dynamic and supportive work environment that fosters creativity and professional development.
Resources for ongoing training, certification, and skill-building in generative AI and related fields.
A collaborative, inclusive workplace with access to global expertise through Artefact's network.


This position is based in Brussels.

Don't worry if you don't meet every criterion! We value passion, potential, and a commitment to innovation. If you're excited about generative AI and ready to grow your career, we'd love to hear from you!

Title: Data Scientist - Banking
Description:
Data Scientist – Financial Services

About NORRIQ

NORRIQ is an international organization headquartered in Denmark and Belgium, with over 350 consultants dedicated to driving business transformation through innovative technology.

Our Financial Services (FS) practice includes 100+ specialists helping banks and financial institutions adapt to evolving client expectations, leverage cutting-edge technologies, and navigate increasingly complex regulatory environments.

At NORRIQ, we believe that people are our greatest asset. We foster a culture of innovation, growth, and excellence, offering tailored training, clear career paths, and a strong sense of community. Join us on this exciting journey and become a valued member of the NORRIQ family — connected for life!

The Opportunity

NORRIQ Financial Services is looking for a Data Scientist to accelerate our data analytics, machine learning, and generative AI initiatives. You will work with leading financial institutions to design, build, and deliver data-driven and AI-powered solutions that create tangible business impact.

Roles & Responsibilities

Client-Facing Responsibilities


Design and implement machine learning and generative AI solutions for complex financial use cases.
Conduct exploratory data analysis and build insightful dashboards or visualizations.
Present analytical findings and actionable recommendations to senior management and stakeholders.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams (Data Engineers, Business Analysts, Developers) to industrialize AI solutions.
Provide technical guidance and advisory on data science and AI best practices.


Technical Responsibilities


Develop and maintain AI and ML models using Python, scikit-learn, and deep learning frameworks.
Apply a wide range of analytical methodologies, including:
Generative AI techniques (Prompt Engineering, RAG, Fine-tuning, Speech-to-Text, Agentic Applications, Image Generation & Interpretation)
Predictive AI and classical machine learning approaches.
Contribute to production-grade AI applications using tools such as GitLab, DVC, and MLOps frameworks.
Ensure reproducibility, version control, and performance optimization across models and pipelines.
Create and maintain Jupyter notebooks for experimentation and documentation.

Internal Contributions


Contribute to NORRIQ’s AI & Data Science Center of Excellence through knowledge sharing and internal projects.
Support proposal writing and solution architecture for client engagements.
Stay at the forefront of developments in data science, AI, and GenAI frameworks (LangChain, Haystack, etc.).


Our Data Scientist Must Have


Fluency in English, and Dutch or French, with at least passive knowledge of the other
Belgian residency
At least few years of experience in a similar role.


What NORRIQ Offers You


Be part of a fast-growing, international organization with a unique and people-centered culture
Enjoy a highly competitive compensation package, including a company car, iPhone, and additional allowances
Access extensive training programs in Belgium and Denmark, focusing on both technical expertise and soft skills
Work with a dynamic and diverse team of experienced professionals and young talent in a collaborative environment within the financial services sector


Join NORRIQ to elevate your career, contribute to transformative projects, and make a lasting impact in the financial services industry!

Data Scientist – Financial Services

About NORRIQ

NORRIQ is an international organization headquartered in Denmark and Belgium, with over 350 consultants dedicated to driving business transformation through innovative technology.

Our Financial Services (FS) practice includes 100+ specialists helping banks and financial institutions adapt to evolving client expectations, leverage cutting-edge technologies, and navigate increasingly complex regulatory environments.

At NORRIQ, we believe that people are our greatest asset. We foster a culture of innovation, growth, and excellence, offering tailored training, clear career paths, and a strong sense of community. Join us on this exciting journey and become a valued member of the NORRIQ family — connected for life!

The Opportunity

NORRIQ Financial Services is looking for a Data Scientist to accelerate our data analytics, machine learning, and generative AI initiatives. You will work with leading financial institutions to design, build, and deliver data-driven and AI-powered solutions that create tangible business impact.

Roles & Responsibilities

Client-Facing Responsibilities

  • Design and implement machine learning and generative AI solutions for complex financial use cases.
  • Conduct exploratory data analysis and build insightful dashboards or visualizations.
  • Present analytical findings and actionable recommendations to senior management and stakeholders.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams (Data Engineers, Business Analysts, Developers) to industrialize AI solutions.
  • Provide technical guidance and advisory on data science and AI best practices.

Technical Responsibilities

  • Develop and maintain AI and ML models using Python, scikit-learn, and deep learning frameworks.
  • Apply a wide range of analytical methodologies, including:
    • Generative AI techniques (Prompt Engineering, RAG, Fine-tuning, Speech-to-Text, Agentic Applications, Image Generation & Interpretation)
    • Predictive AI and classical machine learning approaches.
  • Contribute to production-grade AI applications using tools such as GitLab, DVC, and MLOps frameworks.
  • Ensure reproducibility, version control, and performance optimization across models and pipelines.
  • Create and maintain Jupyter notebooks for experimentation and documentation.
Internal Contributions

  • Contribute to NORRIQ’s AI & Data Science Center of Excellence through knowledge sharing and internal projects.
  • Support proposal writing and solution architecture for client engagements.
  • Stay at the forefront of developments in data science, AI, and GenAI frameworks (LangChain, Haystack, etc.).

Our Data Scientist Must Have

  • Fluency in English, and Dutch or French, with at least passive knowledge of the other
  • Belgian residency
  • At least few years of experience in a similar role.

What NORRIQ Offers You

  • Be part of a fast-growing, international organization with a unique and people-centered culture
  • Enjoy a highly competitive compensation package, including a company car, iPhone, and additional allowances
  • Access extensive training programs in Belgium and Denmark, focusing on both technical expertise and soft skills
  • Work with a dynamic and diverse team of experienced professionals and young talent in a collaborative environment within the financial services sector

Join NORRIQ to elevate your career, contribute to transformative projects, and make a lasting impact in the financial services industry!

Title: Data Scientist - Intermediate (AI Community)
Description:
At TELUS Digital, data is the lifeblood of our innovation, and as an data scientist, you are the guardian of its quality. We don't just process data; we interrogate it. You will perform rigorous diagnostic testing on model performance to uncover hidden biases, identify performance "plateaus," and provide the statistical evidence we need to push AI "intelligence" to the next level.







Key Responsibilities:




Architect and execute evaluation frameworks to measure model accuracy, helpfulness, and safety across massive datasets.
Perform advanced data-wrangling to transform raw text into optimized training sets for Large Language Models (LLMs).
Detect and visualize complex trends in model failures, providing actionable insights that guide the next phase of AI training.
Develop automated scripts to monitor the consistency of human-annotated data, ensuring the quality standards of TELUS Digital are met.







Qualification path




Mandatory Qualifications:




Education: Minimum of a Bachelor’s Degree in Data Science, Mathematics, Statistics, Physics, or a related technical field.
English Proficiency: Minimum B1 (Intermediate) level English to communicate data trends.
Language: Native-level fluency in at least one language.
Technical Skills: Basic proficiency in data manipulation (e.g., Python, SQL, or Excel).







Assessment:




In order to be hired into our community, you’ll go through a subject-specific qualification exam that will determine your suitability for the position and complete ID verification.







Why Join the TELUS Digital AI Community:




Community Connection: Work remotely as part of a 1M+ diverse global AI Community of contributors and experts.
Impactful Expertise: Use your native language and academic degree to shape real-world AI systems and products used by millions every day.
Hands-on Innovation: Gain experience in the latest AI research, evaluation, and fine-tuning methodologies.
Global Collaboration: Collaborate with a network of specialists across 20+ domains and 500+ languages and dialects.
Flexible Engagement: Manage your own schedule while making a meaningful impact on the future of technology.







Equal Opportunity:




All qualified applicants will receive consideration for a contractual relationship without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or protected veteran status. At TELUS Digital AI, we are proud to offer equal opportunities and are committed to creating a diverse and inclusive community. All aspects of selection are based on applicants’ qualifications, merits, competence, and performance without regard to any characteristic related to diversity.

Title: Internship in AI/ML 2026
Description:
Devoteam is a leading consulting firm focused on digital transformation. We help our clients leverage technology

to achieve their business goals.

Our longstanding partnerships with leaders like AWS, Google Cloud, Microsoft, and ServiceNow amplify our capabilities, allowing us to deliver top-tier expertise and award-winning services. We complement these partnerships with in-depth Cyber, Data & AI, Software development and multi cloud expertise.

For 30 years, we have always been guiding our customers on the next tech wave. Devoteam has guided organizations through the Internet and cloud. The next revolution? AI.

With 11,000 tech natives working in 25+ countries, we bring you highly skilled IT experts across Europe

At Devoteam, tech is in our DNA, and it’s the people we empower with tech. Now, with responsible AI, we’re ready to unlock a future where technology drives positive change.

Job Description

Project Overview:

We are entering an era where Generative AI is no longer just a trend but a core business requirement. Our AWS AI/ML team is launching the Enterprise GenAI Accelerator project. This internship offers a unique opportunity for one student to build a production-ready "Accelerator" designed for consultancy teams to demonstrate and deploy high-tier GenAI capabilities on AWS. It provides a perfect foundation for a master's thesis, focusing on the synergy between Large Language Models (LLMs) and modern cloud automation.

Project Description:

The goal is to create a modular, multi-tenant-ready chatbot architecture. This project is built on two fundamental pillars: GenAI Excellence and DevOps Leadership. Using a Python-native stack (Streamlit, Boto3, LangChain), you will develop a decoupled back-end capable of sophisticated reasoning, while simultaneously building the CI/CD pipelines and Infrastructure as Code (IaC) required to deploy this solution at scale.

Qualifications

Focus:

We are looking for a versatile student who is passionate about both AI development and the underlying systems that make AI reliable. You will act as the bridge between data science and software engineering, ensuring that advanced AI models are not just functional, but production-ready, secure, and easily deployable.

Requirements:


Programming: Strong proficiency in Python (the primary language for both AI logic and infrastructure).
Cloud Knowledge: Familiarity with AWS services and a strong interest in "Cloud Native" development.
Automation Mindset: A desire to automate everything, from model testing to cloud resource provisioning.
Problem Solving: Ability to navigate complex documentation and integrate emerging AI tools.
Dutch language - fully proffesional level



Additional Information

What we have to offer:


Benefits to Participants:
Practical Experience: Hands-on work with leading technologies in cloud computing, data processing, and full-stack development.
Mentorship: Guidance from experienced professionals in the industry.
Networking: Opportunities to connect with industry experts and potential future employers.



Recruitment process ✍️?


HR Interview: Meet Andreea our Recruiter for a coffee chat of 30 minutes via video call
Meet our Tribe Leaders for an in depth technical discussion
